title: 11 Natural Herbal Creams for Elderly Hiccups
description: Piper nigrum creams, also known as black pepper creams, have been used for centuries to help relieve hiccups. The cream contains a compound called piperine, which is the active ingredient responsible for its effectiveness. Piperine has a numbing effect on the nerves in the throat, which can help to stop the spasms that cause hiccups.
